allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const a=JSON.parse\(d\); const vulns=a.vulnerabilities||{}; const critical=Object.entries\(vulns\).filter\(\([k,v]\)=>v.severity==='critical'||v.severity==='high'\).map\(\([k,v]\)=>k+': '+v.severity\); console.log\(critical.join\('\\n'\)\)")
